Jeremy, you're absolutely right about people moving on. I remember a time when I was so passionate about the woke-ification of Star Wars, and Hollywood more broadly, and I could not get enough of that content... But it's been at least 2-3 years since I've given any of that stuff attention. It becomes tired and overly-negative. I actually enjoyed Avatar 3. I don't want to listen to an echo chamber bashing it for hours on end, saying the same predictable crap as always. And I'm very right wing!

It's just another case of the pendulum swinging back and forth, culturally. Too much of one thing- and the other thing starts to look like a reprieve.
